title: We Came This Way: Handbook
title-note: accompanying the NBC University of the Air series
additional-note: We have not found any active renewals for the Handbook, but we have not determined the copyright status of the 'We Came This Way' radio programs they accompanied, which first aired in 1944 and 1945.  Copyright may persist in the scripts (which might be renewed under Drama), and in the sound recordings of the episodes.
